text: God is working even when you can’t see it.
Peace isn’t found in control—it’s found in Christ.
Small steps of faith still move mountains.
When you feel weak, God’s strength shows up strong.
Grace means you don’t have to carry yesterday into today.
Prayer changes things—and it changes us first.
God’s timing is not late, and it’s not early. It’s perfect.
You are never alone; God is near to the brokenhearted.
Choose love today—love is how we reflect Jesus.
Let your light show up in simple ways.
A calm spirit is still a powerful testimony.
Start again. God specializes in fresh starts.
